name: Marketing Cloud Release Notes – 14 Feb 2025
body: [{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"OVERVIEW","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"As part of our ongoing commitment to security, we have updated our authentication procedures."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"To learn more, read ahead!! "}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"AUTHENTICATION-BASED ENHANCEMENT","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Previously, as a first-time log-in user, after you’ve added your username and password, you would be taken to a "},{"text":"Multi-Factor Authentication","bold":true},{"text":" ("},{"text":"MFA","bold":true},{"text":") page, wherein you would be asked to choose either Text-based messaging or a Security app code to verify your account credentials."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"However, with this update, upon verifying your account credential through an OTP (via SMS or security app), you (as a first-time user) will be redirected to a"},{"text":" Multi-Factor Authentication","bold":true},{"text":" ("},{"text":"MFA","bold":true},{"text":") page and be asked to scan the QR code (via an Authenticator app) to receive a confirmation code that completes the MFA setup process. "}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/authenticate16.068J10000091j2lIAA.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/authenticate16.068J10000091j2lIAA.png","name":"authenticate16","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":1216,"width":701,"displaySize":"medium"}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"This is a one-time procedure, and once you’ve completed it, you can henceforth log in to your account by first adding your login credentials and then verifying them with a code from your Authenticator app. "}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/authenticate30.068J10000091j3eIAA.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/authenticate30.068J10000091j3eIAA.png","name":"authenticate30","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":1016,"width":916,"displaySize":"medium"}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Note:","bold":true},{"text":" All users must enable Authenticator app-based MFA since SMS-based MFA has been officially discontinued."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"To learn more about multi-step account validation, read our "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Multi-Factor-Authentication","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA)","bold":true}]},{"text":" article."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"IDENTITY APP ENHANCEMENT","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"We have moved the "},{"text":"Security","bold":true},{"text":" section from the Navigation panel of Maropost’s Identity app to the "},{"text":"User Profile","bold":true},{"text":" section."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/authenticate14.068J10000091j3yIAA.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/authenticate14.068J10000091j3yIAA.png","name":"authenticate14","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":773,"width":1600}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"By clicking on "},{"text":"Update Password","bold":true},{"text":" under the Security section, you can add a new password without entering the old credentials from the password reset page."}]}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/authenticate281.068J10000091fykIAA.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/authenticate281.068J10000091fykIAA.png","name":"authenticate28(1)","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":1422,"width":837,"displaySize":"medium"}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"To
